note: Re-opened § 49-6-2101 (2024) via Justia pathfinder; subsection (e) reads verbatim: boards of education 'in contracting for transportation services with persons owning equipment, are authorized to enter into contracts for such services for periods of time as long as, but not exceeding, six (6) years from the date of making the contracts' — confirming the 6-year max-term and supporting the rebid/renewal answers (no statutory renewal mechanism beyond the 6-year ceiling; transportation-contract bidding not mandated on the face of § 49-6-2101 or § 49-2-203(a)(3)). Tennessee Code Unannotated is published only via the state-sanctioned LexisNexis portal with no free section-level deep link; the official LexisNexis landing page is recorded as the citation URL per the orchestrator's publication-regime efficiency note.
